Header file for including standard type definitions in the JerryScript core.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that includes several standard library headers to provide basic data types and definitions. It uses include guards (`#ifndef JRT_TYPES_H`, `#define JRT_TYPES_H`, and `#endif`) to prevent multiple inclusions of the file, which can cause compilation errors. The included headers are `<float.h>`, `<stdbool.h>`, `<stddef.h>`, `<stdint.h>`, and `<sys/types.h>`, which provide floating-point limits, boolean type definitions, standard type definitions, fixed-width integer types, and system-specific data types, respectively. This header file is likely used to ensure that these fundamental types and definitions are available in the source files that include it.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `float.h`
- `stdbool.h`
- `stddef.h`
- `stdint.h`
- `sys/types.h`
